ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Continued To May-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Party Plaintiff
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. BENJAMIN S. MILLER, ESQ. of Law Offices of Friedman & Bartoumian, Tel No. 818-707-1488 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Defendant DIANA M. PAZ, Tel No. 415-939-3269 appearing in pro per.

Matter was not argued. Defendant Ms. Paz does not object to the Court's granting of Plaintiff's motion. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S Motion To Substitute Party Plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
